'''bahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rheoencephalographically|rheoencephalographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rheoencephalographically|rheoencephalographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bahate|bahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bahatesher|bahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahatesherĂ«m|bahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bahatero|bahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bahateshĂ«|bahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahateshĂ«m|bahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibahatero|gokibahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibahateshĂ«|gokibahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahateshĂ«m|gokibahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobahankerom|gobahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobahankeshĂ«|gobahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahankeshĂ«m|gobahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobahankeya|gobahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bahaterom|bahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahatemu|bahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bahateya|bahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibahaterom|gokibahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahatemu|gokibahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibahateya|gokibahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bahahate|bahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bahahatesher|bahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahahatesherĂ«m|bahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bahahatero|bahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bahahateshĂ«|bahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahahateshĂ«m|bahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibahahatero|gokibahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibahahateshĂ«|gokibahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahahateshĂ«m|gokibahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobahahankerom|gobahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobahahankeshĂ«|gobahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahahankeshĂ«m|gobahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobahahankeya|gobahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bahahaterom|bahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahahatemu|bahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bahahateya|bahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibahahaterom|gokibahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahahatemu|gokibahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibahahateya|gokibahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠte|bĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠtesher|bĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠtero|bĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠhĂŠtero|gokibĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠterom|bĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠtemu|bĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠteya|bĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠhĂŠterom|gokibĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠhĂŠteya|gokibĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafhafte|bafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafhaftesher|bafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafhaftesherĂ«m|bafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafhaftero|bafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafhafteshĂ«|bafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafhafteshĂ«m|bafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafhaftero|gokibafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafhafteshĂ«|gokibafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafhafteshĂ«m|gokibafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafhafnkerom|gobafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafhafnkeshĂ«|gobafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafhafnkeshĂ«m|gobafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafhafnkeya|gobafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafhafterom|bafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafhaftemu|bafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafhafteya|bafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafhafterom|gokibafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafhaftemu|gokibafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafhafteya|gokibafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
